title: Roasted Swede with Midnight Berries
description: A sweet and savory side dish featuring roasted swede, midnight berries, and a hint of earthy melody.
instructions: Peel and chop the swede into 1-inch cubes.
Toss the swede with olive oil, salt, and black pepper in a bowl until evenly coated.
Spread the swede on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes or until tender.
While the swede is roasting, mix the midnight berries with a splash of water in a saucepan.
Bring the berry mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Once the swede is done, toss it with the berry mixture and serve hot.
